question: ¿Qué categorías MCC presentan mayor tasa de fraude?
sql:
SELECT
  te.mcc_description,
  COUNT(*) AS total_transactions,
  SUM(CASE WHEN te.is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fraudulent_transactions,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN te.is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS fraud_rate_percent
FROM transactions_enriched te
GROUP BY te.mcc_description
HAVING COUNT(*) > 100
ORDER BY fraud_rate_percent DESC
LIMIT 10;
error:
Fallo tras 4 intentos. Último error: column te.is_fraud does not exist
LINE 4:   SUM(CASE WHEN te.is_fraud THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fraudulent...
                        ^
